content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 25, 2026, focused on expanding the ecosystem through the submission of new plugin integrations. Two pull requests were opened to incorporate external plugins into the registry.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work, bug fixes, refactoring, or documentation enhancements were reported for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#351](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/351): Addition of `@undesirables/plugin-tcg-oracle` and `plugin-undesirables` to the registry.
*   [#350](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/350): Addition of `@traderouter/plugin-elizaos` to the registry.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*No issues were closed on this date.*

## NEW ISSUES
*No new issues were opened on this date.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported for this date.*
